title: HTML and CSS Basics
description: Learn the foundation of web development with HTML5 and CSS3.

title: JavaScript Fundamentals
description: Master core JavaScript concepts including ES6+ features.

title: React.js for Frontend
description: Build modern single-page applications with React.js.

title: Node.js and Express Backend
description: Create robust server-side applications with Node.js and Express.

title: MongoDB and Database Design
description: Design and manage NoSQL databases using MongoDB.

title: Full Stack Deployment and DevOps
description: Deploy full stack apps using CI/CD pipelines and cloud services.

title: TypeScript Mastery
description: Add type safety to JavaScript projects using TypeScript.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Learn Python fundamentals tailored for data analysis workflows.

title: Statistics and Probability
description: Understand statistical methods essential for data science.

title: Pandas and Data Wrangling
description: Master data manipulation and cleaning with Pandas library.

title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib
description: Create impactful visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn.

title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Learn supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms from scratch.

title: SQL for Data Analysis
description: Write complex SQL queries for data extraction and reporting.

title: Advanced ML and Model Tuning
description: Hyperparameter tuning, ensemble methods, and model deployment.

title: Mathematics for AI
description: Linear algebra, calculus, and optimization for machine learning.

title: Python Programming for AI
description: Python programming with focus on AI/ML libraries and tools.

title: Deep Learning with TensorFlow
description: Build neural networks using TensorFlow and Keras framework.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Text processing, sentiment analysis, and language models.

title: Computer Vision with PyTorch
description: Image classification, object detection, and CNNs using PyTorch.

title: MLOps and Model Deployment
description: End-to-end ML pipelines, model serving, and monitoring.

title: Reinforcement Learning
description: Q-learning, policy gradients, and real-world RL applications.

title: Linux and Shell Scripting
description: Master Linux command line and write automation shell scripts.

title: Git and Version Control
description: Git workflows, branching strategies, and collaboration.

title: Docker Containerization
description: Containerize applications with Docker and Docker Compose.

title: Kubernetes Orchestration
description: Deploy and manage containers at scale using Kubernetes.

title: CI/CD Pipeline with Jenkins
description: Automate build, test, and deploy with Jenkins pipelines.

title: AWS Cloud Fundamentals
description: Core AWS services: EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, and Lambda.

title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
description: Provision cloud infrastructure using Terraform and IaC practices.

title: Monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana
description: Set up monitoring dashboards and alerting for production systems.

title: Networking Fundamentals
description: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, load balancing, and networking essentials.
